description: Enable observer; inject a synthetic observer:narration brain record into .forge/brain/observer/; verify the record is stored and retrievable within 2 s, simulating the live card update without page reload.

execute.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const d=p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge','brain','observer'); const ts=Date.now(); const record={content:'Slice 5 completed successfully. No anomalies detected.',timestamp:new Date(ts).toISOString(),cost_usd:0.0012,source:'observer'}; fs.writeFileSync(p.join(d,ts+'.json'),JSON.stringify(record,null,2)); const files=fs.readdirSync(d).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.json')); if(files.length<1)throw new Error('narration record not written'); const read=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p.join(d,files[0]),'utf-8')); if(!read.content)throw new Error('narration content field missing'); if(!read.timestamp)throw new Error('narration timestamp missing'); console.log('ok narration live-update: record written and retrievable: '+read.content.slice(0,30));"
